name: Lodor
description: RomM thin-client — whole-library stubs, download-on-launch, two-way save sync
author: lodordev

changelog.0.9.6: Self-update notices (store badge + daily check after a good sync), pairing self-heal for preseeded/cloned cards, Tailscale QR sign-in no longer times out, sync engine 0.9.6 (save-integrity + cross-device Recently Played interop).
changelog.0.9.7: 0.9.7: fleet core alignment (states-portable cores), stale auto-state retirement on restore, Handoff state manifests (dark), engine sync fixes. First release in lockstep with the new Android lane.
